title.en: The spiritual field here is very distorted and ...

content.en:
Xuan Mingjun's methods are too terrifying, and he can wipe out one strong man after another across a long territory.

Many treacherous powerhouses were killed by Xuan Ming Jun before they left the Ghost Sacred Domain.

this day.

Xuan Mingjun killed other territories, and was finally besieged by three treacherous powerhouses who had undergone eighteen spiritual transformations~ together.

This battle lasted for a long time, and in the end, Xuan Mingjun was killed, but it also injured a treacherous powerhouse who had undergone eighteen spiritual transformations, making the other party's injuries not light.

And after Xuan Ming Jun was killed, many powerful people dared to come back to the Ghost Sacred Domain.

......

Where Xuan Mingjun fought with several eighteen spiritual transformation and treacherous powerhouses, Ye Tian came here, and there was still their strength here.

The spiritual field here is very distorted and full of various powers.

Ye Tian came here mainly to comprehend the residual power here, which had a huge effect on his comprehension of more powerful killing moves and the improvement of the Dark Star Secret Method.

After a long period of time, the spiritual field here gradually dissipated, and Ye Tian left.

Time flies.

A long time passes.

Ye Tian's cultivation gradually improved to the level of seventeen spiritual transformations, and he created some killing moves, his combat power was already comparable to the top eighteen spiritual transformations powerhouses, perhaps even stronger than the original Xuanming Monarch.

this day.

He traveled to the Heavenly Domain, which was the core of the Heaven and Earth.

After entering the Heavenly Trick Domain, Ye Tiancai began to look for better trick talents, as well as collect more trick cheats.

Unconsciously, his tricky talent is getting higher and higher, and he has obtained more and more trickish cheats, gradually improving himself, making his strength stronger and stronger.

After a long time.

Ye Tian's cultivation had reached the level of eighteen spiritual transformations, and his talent had also been raised to the limit.

Only then did he begin to gather information about the Psychic Treachery, but only sporadic information could be gathered.

For this reason, he traded all aspects of information with many sophistic powerhouses, and was also targeted by some sophistication powerhouses.

However, on this day, he killed an eighteen spiritual transformation powerhouses who had ill intentions towards him, and this became completely famous.

Over the years, he had gathered a lot of scattered information, and he had a general understanding of the situation of the spiritual perversity.

If you want to achieve spiritual transformation, you need your own spiritual strength to be strong enough, tough enough, and high enough in your state of mind.

That's right, the state of mind is very high, and the state of mind of many eighteen times of spiritual transformation is not good, so the breakthrough fails.

And Ye Tian's state of mind was naturally extremely high, so it was not difficult for him to impact the spiritual transformation.

And so.

After Ye Tian's spirit was raised to the limit, he directly began to impact the spiritual treacherous realm.

Soon.

Ye Tian's spirit absorbed countless tricky powers, so that his spirit gradually began to change, and there were no problems.

After a long time, Ye Tian's spirit had a special change, this was a treacherous change, he seemed to have insight into everything in heaven and earth.

It's an amazing feeling!

"The Spiritual Transformation Realm, I have reached it, and then I have to try to create the ultimate dimensional killing move of the Spiritual Transformation Realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

To this end, he began to break into some of the ruins of the Lord of the Tricks, and several times he almost fell, but in the end he gained something.

At the same time, he also spied some traces of the ultimate dimensional killing moves, and through the understanding of these traces and inheritances, Ye Tian gradually comprehended a trace of mystery, which was very helpful for creating the ultimate dimensional killing moves.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian began to practice penance.

Anyway, he was not in a hurry, and spent a long time cultivating and creating the ultimate dimensional killing move step by step.

In this way, an incomparably long period passed.

Finally this day.

Ye Tian created the first ultimate dimensional killing move, Trick Annihilation, which invisibly obliterated the soul will of others, which can be called a very terrifying killing move.

After creating this ultimate dimensional killing move, Ye Tian's spiritual transformation speed was even faster, and it didn't take long for the spiritual transformation to come to an end.

He completely completed the spiritual transformation and became the master of the sophistication.

And at the moment when he became the master of the trick, his spiritual power covered the entire realm of the world, and he spied on the most original trick power.

At this time.

He silently returned to the Void Heaven Palace, not daring to snatch those forces that possessed the Lord of the Trick, because the Lord of the Trick could attack and kill him from a long distance, and he didn't have time to escape.

0 for flowers0

Therefore, simply return directly to the Void Heaven Palace.

......

Void Heaven Palace.

Ye Tian's consciousness returned, and then the ultimate will began to improve and transform.

These are the two ultimate dimensional killing moves of the Domain Field of Trickery and Trick Annihilation, which made Ye Tian's ultimate will begin to transform and become more and more powerful.

It was a long time before this metamorphosis ended.

At this time.

Ye Tian's physical fitness has not improved much, but the ultimate will has increased too many times, plus two more ultimate dimensional killing moves, he now has a total of four ultimate dimensional killing moves, and his strength is much stronger than in the past.

And after Ye Tian came back, he saw the Void Immortal Realm again, and the other party also found that Ye Tian's breath had changed.

"Ye Tian Realm Lord, your breath ...... Could it be that you have mastered the Ultimate Dimension Killing Move again?" said the Void Immortal Realm Lord in surprise.

"Well, I have mastered the ultimate dimensional killing move in the Mysterious Realm!" Ye Tian said.

"What, you can actually master the ultimate dimensional killing move in the Mysterious Realm, I don't even dare to go in, the chance of falling there is too high!"

While chatting, the Void Immortal Realm Lord suddenly invited: "Ye Tian Realm Lord, your current strength should far surpass mine, why don't you go to the Golden True Sea of the Dimensional Sea!"

The Golden Sea?

Ye Tian didn't know this place.

The Void Immortal Realm Lord said: "The Golden True Sea is a treasure land that has only recently been discovered, many of the Nine Realms peak powerhouses in the dimensional heaven and earth will go there, and a group of Nine Realm peak powerhouses in our Void Heaven Palace who have mastered the ultimate dimensional killing moves will also go over, and I am also ready to go over and give it a chance." It is said that a treasure called the Heavenly Reverse Xuanjing was born there, and this treasure can allow us to transform our talents when we descend to other dimensional heavens and earths, so that it will be easier to grow. If there are enough Heavenly Reverse Xuanjing, then the Heaven and Earth of the Descending Dimension can have extremely high talents, which cannot be allowed to fall, and the probability of mastering the Ultimate Dimension killing move will be many times higher. "

"In addition, the Golden True Sea also has some treasures that can assist in comprehending the rules of the Supreme Dimension, as well as a large number of resources. "

After listening to the words of the Void Immortal Realm Lord, Ye Tian prepared to go to the Golden True Sea Eight.
